positive: A maximalist, intricate pattern design featuring stylized glowing bioluminescent flora and crystalline geometric formations set against a deep, dark cosmic void. Central composition focused on a magnificent, spiraling nebula effect, incorporating deep sapphire blues, vibrant teal, glowing magenta, and neon coral accents. The style is highly detailed, psychedelic neo-art Nouveau meets deep space exploration, rendered with sharp, clean silhouettes and extremely high contrast. Use dramatic subsurface scattering for the glowing elements, giving it a dreamy, ethereal, yet sharply defined print-ready aesthetic. The pattern should be non-repeating but balanced, suitable for full-chest apparel printing. Volumetric lighting, 8k, hyper-detailed, vector art qualities.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, lowres, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, abstract scribble, dirty, messy, amateur, poorly rendered, cropped
